description: Install or update Vault in this vault: install the governance bundle, scaffold the partner layer, and write module config.
args: {-H: headless mode}|{inline values: skip prompts with provided values}
outputs: config.yaml and config.user.yaml + governance installed into the vault

description: The keeper of the collection — integrates sources, keeps the wiki healthy and single-home, carries the maintenance discipline.
outputs: a working Librarian session; wiki / index / log / session / thread updates

description: The intellectual sparring partner — reaches into the world to build new knowledge and pushes you to learn.
outputs: a working Researcher session; research notes; log / session / thread updates

description: The design and fabrication partner — turns curated wiki knowledge into made PARA deliverables; owns extraction; reframes toward producing.
args: {inline task: e.g. 'extract a resource doc on X'}
outputs: a working Creative session; PARA deliverables (via extract); log / session / thread updates

description: Integrate a brought-in source into the wiki — change the wiki because of the source. The single writer of canonical pages.
outputs: updated/created wiki page(s), a research note, index + log entries

description: Investigate a question against the web and file a standalone research note; offers a wiki hand-off to the Librarian.
args: {question: the precise question}|{depth: quick | moderate | deep}
outputs: a dated research note (+ log entry); an offered wiki pass via the Librarian

description: Answer a question by synthesizing curated wiki knowledge, with provenance on every claim; files back when it earns persistence.
args: {question: what to answer from the wiki}
outputs: a cited, synthesized answer; optional research note or wiki page (via the Librarian)

description: Shape wiki knowledge into a human-facing PARA artifact (project / area / resource). The one sanctioned partner write into PARA.
args: {topic: subject of the deliverable}|{target: projects | areas | resources}
outputs: a PARA deliverable filed in projects/ areas/ or resources/ (+ log entry)

description: Health-check the wiki and fix safe structural problems; flags the rest and files merge candidates to the backlog.
args: {--full: sweep everything (default is since last lint)}
outputs: a structured lint report, safe auto-fixes, maintenance backlog items

description: The vault's partner communication bus — one routing record (_agent/dispatch.md) with a drain, three modes. `daily` scans the human capture stream and routes each fragment to the partner whose domain it serves (the original router, now named); `relay` appends a pre-addressed partner→partner handoff pointer (doc-path idempotent; fired automatically when a partner writes a handoff doc, runnable by hand for debugging); `ledger` is a read-only board of everything still open. A bare call lists the modes and asks which to run. Writes open, checkable items each partner drains by grepping its slug; reads daily/ only in `daily` mode; never edits a daily note; never auto-ingests.
args: {mode: daily | relay | ledger; bare call → menu}
outputs: a neutral routing record (_agent/dispatch.md) of open/picked-up items across daily + relay traffic; a log entry per write mode

description: Grow the roster: mint a new operation skill, a new partner, a persona self-edit, or retire a partner. The self-evolution engine.
outputs: a new vlt-* skill / partner / persona edit; live module-help.csv + manifest updates

description: Run a persona-lens panel over a mint or a contested question and synthesize a structured verdict. The blast-radius gate.
args: {question: the contested question}|{kind: mint kind, when gating a mint}
outputs: a structured verdict (consensus / disputed-resolved / disputed-open / recommended actions)

description: Upgrade the Vault module without destroying vault-specific evolution: preserve minted partners, local convention overlays, and mint history; merge-not-replace registration; record divergence in the standing ledger.
args: {source: path to the updated module source}|{bracket: reconcile after the installer runs}
outputs: reconciled install + appended _agent/upgrade-ledger.md entry + post-flight divergence report
